'''Karalan''' was a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and a member of the security staff of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]].

==Biography==

Karalan began his career working for [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] in the [[Lexas systems]], but instead of earning [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]], he only accumulated debts. He eventually lost his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and was almost killed by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="AIR" />

He managed to hook up with [[Talas Piran]] and [[Tir'uh]], two high-ranking members of the Mytaranor Slaving Council, and they liked him enough to hire him for the security staff of their mobile headquarters, the [[Kiltirin-class dungeon ship|Mandalorian Dungeon Ship]] [[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']].<ref name="AIR" />
